# terrible_community_general_logentries (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `path` (String) Path to a log file.

### Optional

- `logtype` (String) Type of the log.
- `name` (String) Name of the log.
- `state` (String) Following state of the log.
